title: Recruiting Coordinator
description: We're hiring a Recruiting Coordinator at Honeywell. This is an exciting opportunity to join our engineering-focused, global, innovation-oriented team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 0-2 years years of experience and are passionate about Industrial, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Contribute to team projects and strategic initiatives
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on deliverables
Support management with analysis and reporting
Identify process improvements and efficiency opportunities
Participate in professional development and training activities
